package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
    var qtd_fig_album int
    var qtd_fig_baruel int 
    var sequencia int 

    fmt.Scan(&qtd_fig_album)
    fmt.Scan(&qtd_fig_baruel)
    fmt.Scan(&sequencia)

    fmt.Println(qtd_fig_album)
    fmt.Println(qtd_fig_baruel)
    fmt.Println(sequencia)

}
